svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Side-1" id="AKVx57fGSh3k_eIwfHAE"> <mxGraphModel dx="1664" dy="1131" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#111827;strokeColor=#111827;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;spacing=12;arcSize=8;" value="Deployment diagram – VIGOR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="760" x="420" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=13;fontColor=#374151;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="Overblik over hvordan klient, API, autentificering og database er placeret i første version" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="760" x="420" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="networkBoundary" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9ca3af;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;arcSize=8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="720" width="1460" x="70" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="networkLabel" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#111827;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="Internt/lukket netværk på bostedet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="430" x="100" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffActor" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#111827;" value="Personale" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="60" x="145" y="305" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="leaderActor" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#111827;" value="Leder / vagtansvarlig" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="70" x="145" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clientNode" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#92400e;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;arcSize=10;" value="<b>Windows-enhed / personale-PC</b><br><hr>Kører VIGOR-klienten lokalt" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="320" x="320" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clientArtifact" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#b45309;fontSize=13;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;arcSize=8;" value="<b>VIGOR MAUI Blazor Hybrid</b><br><hr>Blazor UI<br>Borgeroversigt<br>Statusopdatering<br>Fast medicin UI<br>HTTP-klient<br>JWT-token ved API-kald" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="260" x="350" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="serverNode" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#1e40af;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;arcSize=10;" value="<b>Intern server / API-host</b><br><hr>Hoster backend og forretningslogik" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="390" width="390" x="780" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apiArtifact" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#1e40af;fontSize=13;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;arcSize=8;" value="<b>ASP.NET Core Web API</b><br><hr>REST endpoints<br>Controllers<br>Application services<br>Server-side validering<br>Afdelingsbaseret adgangskontrol" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="320" x="815" y="315" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="authArtifact" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#6b21a8;fontSize=13;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;arcSize=8;" value="<b>ASP.NET Identity + JWT</b><br><hr>Login<br>Roller<br>Brugeridentitet<br>Token-baseret adgang<br>Personale / Vagtansvarlig / Leder" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="320" x="815" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="databaseNode" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=none;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;" value="<b>Database</b><br><hr>SQLite / lokal database<br><br>Departments<br>Citizens<br>Employees<br>FixedMedications<br>AspNetUsers<br>Identity-tabeller" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="260" width="270" x="1240" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="publicScreen" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#991b1b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacing=12;arcSize=10;dashed=1;" value="<b>Fremtidig public skærm</b><br><hr>Anonym oversigtsskærm<br>Ingen personhenførbare oplysninger<br><br><font color='#991b1b'>Planlagt senere use case</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="320" x="320" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="securityNote" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f9fafb;strokeColor=#6b7280;fontSize=13;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Sikkerhed og afgrænsning</b><br><hr>Systemet er tænkt som et internt system i første version.<br>Klienten kalder API’et med JWT-token.<br>Serveren udleder bruger, rolle og afdeling.<br>Klienten bestemmer ikke selv adgang eller afdeling.<br>Public/anonym visning er markeret som fremtidig udvidelse." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="145" width="620" x="780" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eStaffClient" edge="1" parent="1" source="staffActor" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#374151;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" target="clientNode" value="bruger"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eLeaderClient" edge="1" parent="1" source="leaderActor" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#374151;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" target="clientNode" value="bruger"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eClientApi" edge="1" parent="1" source="clientNode" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#1f2937;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="serverNode" value="HTTP/HTTPS API-kald
JWT-token"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eApiDb" edge="1" parent="1" source="serverNode" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#166534;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="databaseNode" value="Entity Framework Core"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eAuthApi" edge="1" parent="1" source="authArtifact" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;strokeColor=#6b21a8;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;" target="apiArtifact" value="autentificering
autorisation"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ePublicApi" edge="1" parent="1" source="publicScreen" style="endArrow=block;html=1;rounded=1;dashed=1;strokeColor=#991b1b;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="serverNode" value="fremtidig anonym læsevisning"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="690" y="745" /> <mxPoint x="690" y="650" /> <mxPoint x="975" y="650" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Sikkerhed og afgrænsning
Systemet er tænkt som et internt system i første version.
Klienten kalder API’et med JWT-token.
Serveren udleder bruger, rolle og afdeling.
Klienten bestemmer ikke selv adgang eller afdeling.
Public/anonym visning er markeret som fremtidig udvidelse.
